name: Party Time Popcorn Bars
recipeIngredient: 11 ounces Praline nut mix (or honey roasted mixed nuts)
3/4 cup Dried cranberries, finely chopped (or raisins)
1/4 cup Mini candy coated chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9x13 inch pan with foil, extending the foil over the sides; butter the foil.
2. In a large bowl, combine popcorn, nuts, and cranberries (or raisins); set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt margarine and marshmallows over low heat, stirring constantly until melted.
4. Pour the melted mixture over the popcorn mix in the bowl; stir well to combine.
5. Press the mixture into the foil-lined pan.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top of the mixture.
7. Lightly press down on the chocolate chips to ensure they are fully incorporated.
8. Refrigerate for 1 hour to allow the bars to cool and set.
9. Remove from the pan by lifting the foil, then peel off the foil from the mixture.
10. Cut into 36 bars.
